scenario: A student has 800 shillings to last until Monday and asks if it's enough for food and transport.
A first-year asks how to check their HELB/HEF loan status and what to do if it says successful but no money arrived.
A student photographs handwritten lecture notes and asks for a short summary and a quiz.
A student asks the assistant to plan their day given two classes and an assignment due Friday.
A student selling mitumba hoodies for 500 bob asks for a catchy WhatsApp status advert in Sheng.
A student asks how much M-Pesa charges to send 1,200 shillings.
A student is confused by a fee statement and asks what the balance and deadline mean in simple Swahili.
A student asks for the campus security and GBV helpline numbers.
A student asks the fare from University of Embu to town during evening rush.
A student wants flashcards from a past paper photo to revise for an exam tomorrow.
